candidates.why: Exact total current assets line on the balance sheet; directly matches ACT.

candidates.row_label: Current assets excl. cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Current assets subtotal excluding cash, so not the full ACT definition.
Balancing line, not a reported current assets total.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line; best match for CHE.
Could represent cash, but appears blank and is less standard than the explicit cash and cash equivalents line.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at year end
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash agrees conceptually, but balance sheet label is preferred for CHE.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash line as preferred.

candidates.why: Exact total current liabilities line on the balance sheet; directly matches LCT.
Could be the same concept, but appears blank while an explicit total current liabilities line exists.
Only a component of current liabilities, not the total.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Clean total for current financing-related debt and excludes lease liabilities via separate current lease liabilities line; best match for STD.
Component of current debt, but would be incomplete if used alone because commercial paper is also present.

candidates.row_label: Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year
candidates.why: Current portion of long-term debt, but values are zero and current interest-bearing liabilities is a cleaner reported total.
Refers to lease maturities here and must be excluded from STD under baseline rule.

variables.notes: Chose a confident label outside the shortlist. It is the reported total current interest-bearing debt, while lease liabilities are separately disclosed and therefore excluded.

candidates.why: Exact current taxes payable/current tax liabilities line; best match for TXP.

variables.notes: Direct match to taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

candidates.why: Direct balance sheet PPE line; best available match for property, plant and equipment.
Would be gross tangible assets, but appears blank and is less preferable than the explicit PPE line.

candidates.row_label: Disposal of property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Cash flow activity, not a balance sheet PPE stock measure.

variables.notes: Chose a confident label outside the shortlist because it is the explicit balance sheet PPE line and preferable to cash-flow activity labels.

candidates.why: Exact total assets line on the balance sheet; directly matches AT.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total assets line.

candidates.why: Exact operating cash flow / net cash from operating activities line; best match for OANCF.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Pre-working-capital subtotal, not final operating cash flow.

variables.notes: Used the final operating cash flow line rather than the before-working-capital subtotal.
